categories.label: VFX
categories.description: Particle effects, screen shake, floating text, debris, trails, destruction

items.name: smoke
items.description: Rising gray puffs — destruction, impact, respawn dust

items.name: burst
items.signature: burst(particles, x, y, color, count = 20, power = 0.18)
items.description: Radial particle explosion in a single color

items.name: trail
items.signature: spawnTrail(particles, x, y, color, count = 1, spread = 4)
items.description: Trailing particles behind a moving object — projectiles, dashes

items.name: float-text
items.signature: spawnFloat(floats, x, y, text, color?, life?)
items.description: Floating damage / score numbers that rise and fade

items.name: debris
items.description: Physics chunks for wall break, prop destruction

items.name: section-destroy
items.description: Polygon-based sprite destruction — splits a sprite into pieces that fall one by one as HP drops

items.name: vs-bar-top
items.description: Two-player VS top header (Castle Clashers style trapezoids)

items.name: hp-segmented
items.description: Discrete chunks (3 hearts, 5 chunks, 10 slim segments)

items.name: hp-percentage
items.signature: drawHpPercentage(ctx, x, y, w, h, { pct, ... })
items.description: Continuous HP bar with numeric percentage label

items.name: timer
items.signature: drawTimer(ctx, x, y, seconds, { size?, urgentBelow? })
items.description: Countdown display, MM:SS, urgent color when low

categories.label: End Screens
categories.description: Game lost / won / try-again overlays with diagonal split + CTA

items.name: game-lost
items.description: Diagonal split, right side red, replaceable headline + CTA

items.name: game-won
items.description: Diagonal split, right side blue, confetti, replaceable headline + CTA

items.name: try-again
items.description: Neutral 'almost there' overlay with amber ribbon — encourages retry

categories.label: Mechanics
categories.description: Input, camera, turn flow, CTA wiring

items.name: drag-release
items.description: Slingshot / artillery aim with trajectory preview, Pointer Events + capture

items.name: camera-lerp
items.signature: createCamera({ x, y, zoom, smoothMs }) → { setTarget, update, apply, pointerToWorld }
items.description: 2D camera (x, y, zoom) with dt-based lerp + reverse pointer transform

items.name: turn-queue
items.signature: createTurnQueue(order) → { current, advance, peek, reset, isFirstOfRound }
items.description: Round-robin turn manager for PvP / multi-actor games

items.name: cta-trigger
items.description: Resolve store-open across Voodoo VSDK, MRAID, and parent postMessage fallbacks

categories.label: Templates
categories.description: Skeleton HTML scaffolds to drop your game code into

items.name: playable-shell
items.description: Self-contained 360×640 portrait shell — viewport, no-scroll body, base64-asset slot, CTA-ready
